architecture_decisions.fuel_classification: Price-based: Petrol is rate > 105, Diesel is rate < 100
architecture_decisions.totalizer_mapping: DU1 Petrol (~1.5M), DU1 Diesel (~1.24M), DU2 Petrol (~45k), DU2 Diesel (~1.23M). Sorting by opening totalizer descending maps DU1 (larger) and DU2 (smaller).
architecture_decisions.sync_credentials: Gist credentials must be loaded from localStorage under 'octaneflow_sync_cfg' (never hardcoded in app.js)
architecture_decisions.draft_pruning: Prune draft entries once they match verified production dates, keeping local storage clean.
